title: Kimi K2.6 and Agent Swarm explained..
summary: Kimi K2.6 is a coding-focused LLM released by MoonShot AI that excels at long-running tasks and agent swarm applications. The model represents an improvement over K2.5 as the underlying LLM matures into a more stable and comprehensive offering from Chinese labs.
